segments.text: Then said some of his disciples among themselves,
What is this that he saith unto us, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me: and, Because I go to the Father?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: What is this that he saith, A little while? we cannot tell what he saith.
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Now Jesus knew that they were desirous to ask him, and said unto them,
Lo, now speakest thou plainly, and speakest no proverb.
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Now are we sure that thou knowest all things, and needest not that any man should ask thee: by this we believe that thou camest forth from God.
segments.speaker: Disciples
